exact_quote: Arizona Snowbowl offers a total of 61 trails. 54 trails are serviced by eight lifts for skiers and snowboarders of all ability levels.
notes: Official resort site states 61 trails; difficulty % conflicted across sources (37/42/21 vs 27/39/21/11) so withheld.

exact_quote: Ascutney Outdoors operates a T-bar lift that serves eight maintained ski trails covering 26 acres.
notes: Eight maintained alpine trails per Wikipedia; no difficulty % published.

exact_quote: Hurricane Ridge has a total of 10 ski trails. Beginner: 25%. Intermediate: 25%. Expert: 50%.
